divisions.title: Esther Becomes Queen
divisions.summary: Vashti deposed; a Jewish orphan becomes queen of Persia.

divisions.title: Haman’s Plot
divisions.theme: For such a time as this
divisions.summary: A decree of annihilation — and Esther risks death to approach the king.

divisions.title: The Great Reversal
divisions.summary: A sleepless night flips everything; Haman falls, and Purim is born.
